path.aria-label: This is an Adobe® Illustrator® File that was saved without PDF Content. To Place or open this fle in other applications, it should be re-saved from Adobe Illustrator with the "Create PDF Compatible File" option turned on. This option is in the Illustrator Native Format Options dialog box, which appears when saving an Adobe Illustrator fle using the Save As command.
